creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-02-18 21:09:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Test-Distribution Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
  Log:
  When using this module in a test script, it goes through all the modules
  in your distribution, checks their POD, checks that they compile ok and
  checks that they all define a $VERSION.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Test-Distribution/
  
  PR:             ports/120812
  Submitted by:   Felippe de Meirelles Motta <lippemail at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3000    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/devel/p5-Test-Distribution/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Distribution/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Distribution/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Distribution/pkg-plist (new)
